message:
Expand FFT test coverage and add sparse matrix conformance tests

FFT crate gains comprehensive test suites: helpers.rs adds fftfreq
odd/even, rfftfreq, and fftshift/ifftshift edge cases; lib.rs adds
rfft real-valued output validation, irfft round-trip, and proptest
fuzz for fft↔ifft invertibility; transforms.rs adds 207 lines of
tests covering fft2/ifft2 round-trip, dct-II/III invertibility,
hilbert analytic signal verification, and proptest fuzz for 2D FFT
and DCT. New diff_sparse.rs conformance test validates sparse matrix
differentiation against SciPy reference values.

- crates/fsci-fft/src/helpers.rs: +50 lines of fftfreq/rfftfreq/shift tests
- crates/fsci-fft/src/lib.rs: +124 lines rfft, irfft, proptest fft↔ifft
- crates/fsci-fft/src/transforms.rs: +201 lines fft2, dct, hilbert tests
- crates/fsci-conformance/tests/diff_sparse.rs: new sparse diff conformance
- Cargo.lock, Cargo.toml updates: proptest, serde_json, fsci-sparse deps

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
